name: Cell Thawing (Recovery)

components.name: 4. 转移至 9 mL 预热培养基
components.note: 逐滴加入, 缓冲 DMSO 浓度变化

components.name: 5. 离心 200×g, 5 min (推荐) 或直接铺板
components.note: 大多数细胞系建议离心去 DMSO; 极脆弱细胞可跳过直接铺板

components.name: 6. 弃上清, 新鲜完全培养基重悬, 接种培养瓶
8. 次日换液去除残余 DMSO 和死细胞碎片
9. 恢复 1–2 代后开始实验

notes.en: Quick-thaw to recover frozen cells. Key is speed — DMSO is cytotoxic at 37°C. Most cell lines: centrifuge to remove DMSO. Very fragile cells (e.g., primary neurons): dilute directly without centrifugation. Check viability >90% after recovery. Allow 1–2 passages before experiments.
notes.zh: 关键是速度——DMSO 在 37°C 对细胞有毒。解冻至剩小冰晶即可。大多数细胞系建议离心去 DMSO；极脆弱细胞（如原代神经元）可直接稀释铺板。恢复后确认活力 >90%。

ref: Freshney (2015) Culture of Animal Cells; ATCC Cell Thawing Protocol

note.en: After plating, cells incubate overnight at 37°C; change medium next morning to remove residual DMSO
note.zh: 铺板后细胞 37°C 过夜培养；次日早上换液去除残留 DMSO

usage.en: Recover cryopreserved mammalian cells from liquid nitrogen storage.
usage.zh: 从液氮中复苏冻存的哺乳动物细胞。
